title: Secure first partner; agree language and priority terms
context: oncology-glossary-multilingual cannot reach its Definition of Shipped without a partner organization that adopts and distributes the glossary to beneficiaries. Securing a partner is the M3 entry gate. All M3 tasks are gated on a confirmed partner; verifiedNeed flips to true only when confirmed. A steward must also be named before entering M3. If no partner is secured by approximately 2027-03-31, the project pivots or mothballs per the decision rule in PLAN.md.
objective: Identify and confirm a named cancer-care or advocacy organization as the first partner/requestor, agree on the target language and prioritized term list, and confirm reviewer coverage for that language. On completion, update related tasks with requestor name and verifiedNeed:true.
acceptanceCriteria: A named cancer-care or advocacy organization is confirmed in writing as the requestor/partner, with the confirmation recorded in the PR or receipt

The partner has agreed on: (a) the target language (qualifying per the PLAN target-language selection rule), (b) a prioritized term list, and (c) confirmation that translation-reviewer coverage for the language is available
A steward (last-mile owner) is named before or at completion of this task as a prerequisite to enter M3
On completion, related delivery tasks (translate-002, delivery-001) are updated with the requestor name and verifiedNeed:true
If no partner is secured by approximately 2027-03-31, the pivot/mothball decision is invoked and documented per the rule in PLAN.md
output: docs/partner-agreement.md (or equivalent) recording the confirmed partner, agreed target language, priority terms, steward name, and reviewer coverage confirmation
